programme.title: James & Pat & Dave
programme.desc: It follows Pat Reyes who is a hardworking hostel manager and online vegetable seller who trains her boss' hardheaded and exiled grandson as a hostel employee.

programme.title: Enteng Ng Ina Mo
programme.desc: Under the influence of a magic spell, adventurer Enteng Kabisote falls in love with long-suffering mother Ina. Though Enteng is ready to settle down in a domestic setting, his magical life soon drags Ina and her kids into another world.

programme.title: Moron 5 and The Crying Lady
programme.desc: Five friends with below average intelligence earn the wrath of a wealthy bride-to-be. For this, they are framed for murder. The five have to escape from prison and try to clear their names on the outside.

programme.title: Men Are From QC, Women Are From Alabang
programme.desc: A QC boy and an Alabang girl have been together since college, weathering the distance and other issues that have come their way. But now that they’ve started to work, the “real world” seems to be pushing them even more apart. This is a relationship story told through two different perspectives of the same events, as the couple grows distant (literally and figuratively) through time.

programme.title: Ang Pagsanib kay Leah Dela Cruz
programme.desc: A lady cop who moves into a small town gets drawn to a case that involves a girl that's possessed by an evil spirit.

programme.title: Beauty and the Bestie
programme.desc: For an important case, a policeman needs the help of his former best friend to impersonate the daughter of a foreign dignitary in a beauty pageant.

programme.title: Marita
programme.desc: An actress commits suicide in a theatre full of people. Now she haunts the venue and those who visit.

programme.title: Pag Oras mo, Oras Mo Na
Secret Of Feriha The Untold Story
Tunay Na Magkaibigan Walang Iwanan Peksman
